message:
fix(session): cap JSONL line reads at 100MB to prevent memory exhaustion

Replace BufReader::lines() iterators with explicit read_line() calls
wrapped in .take(100 * 1024 * 1024) across all JSONL parsing paths in
both session.rs and session_index.rs. This prevents a single malformed
or extremely long line from consuming unbounded memory.

- load_session_meta_jsonl: switched from lines() to bounded read_line loop
- open_jsonl_blocking: added .take() cap to header and per-line reads
- open_from_v2_store_blocking: same bounded read treatment
- build_meta_from_jsonl (session_index): mirrored the same pattern
- Improved empty-file detection with explicit n==0 check instead of
  Option::ok_or_else on iterator

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
